title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: DUFUR SBHC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 802 NE 5th Street Dufur, OR 97021 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% federal poverty level Hours: Monday/Thursday 8am-5pm (541) 386-2304 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-2304 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Wasco County SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 8am-5pm Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DUFUR SBHC
